---
title: "English for Professional Purposes"
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/sync-teaching.py from the Teaching repo.
     Do not edit by hand — re-run build.sh (or the script) to regenerate. -->

<p class="teaching-back"><a href="../teaching.html">← All courses</a></p>

## Slides

1. [Course introduction / Globalization of the economy](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-1-slides)
2. [Types of business entities](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-2-slides)
3. [Types of business entities](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-3-slides)
4. [The grammar of cause and effect in business communication](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-4-slides)
5. [Culture and ethics](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-5-slides)
6. [Management and leadership styles](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-6-slides)
7. [Finance of organisations](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-7-slides)
8. [Active vs. passive voice in people management](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-8-slides)
9. [Speaking skills 1: presentations](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-9-slides)
10. [Speaking skills 2: introduction and presentation of the company profile; calls; negotiations](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-10-slides)
11. [Writing skills](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/english-professional-purposes-11-slides)
